Module com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida
Package com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.time

Class TimeManager

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.time.TimeManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITimeManager
public class TimeManager extends Object implements ITimeManager
Implementation of the ITimeManager interface. Manages the countdown timer for each level of the Escritura Rapida typing game. The available time decreases every 5 levels by 2 seconds, with a minimum of 2 seconds per level.
Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Juan JosÃ© Morera GÃ³mez

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private static final int
    INITIAL_TIME
    The initial time in seconds assigned at the start of the game.
    private static final int
    LEVELS_PER_REDUCTION
    The number of levels completed before the time is reduced.
    private static final int
    MIN_TIME
    The minimum time in seconds a level can have.
    private static final int
    TIME_REDUCTION
    The amount of seconds subtracted from the timer every reduction step.
    private int
    timeLeft
    The remaining time in seconds for the current level.

  • Constructor Details

    • TimeManager

      public TimeManager()
      Constructs a new TimeManager instance. Initializes the remaining time to INITIAL_TIME.
      Since:
      1.0

  • Method Details

    • initTime

      public void initTime(int level)
      Initializes the countdown timer for the given level. Calculates the number of reductions based on the level and applies them to the initial time, ensuring the result never falls below MIN_TIME.
      Specified by:
      initTime in interface ITimeManager
      Parameters:
      level - the current game level used to calculate the available time
      Since:
      1.0

    • decrementTime

      public void decrementTime()
      Decrements the remaining time by one second.
      Specified by:
      decrementTime in interface ITimeManager
      Since:
      1.0

    • isTimeUp

      public boolean isTimeUp()
      Checks whether the countdown timer has reached zero.
      Specified by:
      isTimeUp in interface ITimeManager
      Returns:
      true if time is up, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0

    • getTimeLeft

      public int getTimeLeft()
      Returns the remaining time for the current level in seconds.
      Specified by:
      getTimeLeft in interface ITimeManager
      Returns:
      the time left in seconds
      Since:
      1.0
